name: @machinefi/runtime
description: SDK and CLI runtime for Solana machine sessions and deterministic fixtures.

scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js pair --chain robinhood --fixture --machine-id robot-arm-17 --wallet 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111 --operator ops-alpha && node dist/cli/index.js pair --chain solana --fixture --machine-id drone-9 --wallet 11111111111111111111111111111111 --operator ops-alpha && node dist/cli/index.js status --chain robinhood --fixture && node dist/cli/index.js intent build --chain robinhood --source 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111 --recipient 0x2222222222222222222222222222222222222222 --amount 1.25 --machine-id robot-arm-17 --session-id session-1 --fixture && node dist/cli/index.js verify --chain robinhood --tx 0xaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa --fixture --from 0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111 --to 0x2222222222222222222222222222222222222222 --amount 1.25 && node dist/cli/index.js verify --chain solana --signature 5HueCGU8rMjxEXxiPuD5BDuRaRj1hUXQG48GhYnjmQumooWcT3Yr4v7e1i4bnzK7t1Q7Fxx4E2VPu7Y9xV1r5fq --fixture --from 11111111111111111111111111111111 --to Sysvar1111111111111111111111111111111111111
